verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I can hear the sound of His coming everywhere In the headlines resounding by the score It may be another earthquake or just another war But to every child of God it's something more And when I hear the sound of marching Hear the song of battle cry Then I know my Lord is coming Even now it may be nigh

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And I can hear the sound of His coming everywhere They're getting louder and louder each day And they'll crescendo until that great and final sound When the trumpet shall call me away

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I can hear the sound of fig leaves Rustling in the summer breeze As I see the Lord restore Jerusalem And I can hear a sound from Heaven As a rushing mighty wind As God pours His spirit out upon all men And when I hear revival sound Not just here but everywhere Then I know it's almost over I can feel it in the air

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And they'll crescendo until that great and final sound When the trumpet shall call me away
